---
title: "Deploying Remaining Oyster Bags at Baywater Farm"
description: "Assessing the priming treatment"
categories: ["Aquaculture"] #choose "Aquaculture", "Computing", "Epigenetics", "Genomics", "Lab Updates", "Reading Notes", "Transcriptomics"
#citation:
date: 06-10-2026
image: "images/baywater-priming-deploy.jpg" # finding a good image
author:
  - name: Steven Roberts
    url:
    orcid: 0000-0001-8302-1138
    affiliation: Professor, UW - School of Aquatic and Fishery Sciences
    affiliation-url: https://robertslab.info
  #url:  # self-defined
draft: true # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
format:
  html:
    toc: true            # ← enable TOC
    toc-location: left   # or: right, body
    toc-depth: 3         # how many heading levels to show
    code-fold: FALSE
    code-tools: true
    code-copy: true
    highlight-style: github
    code-overflow: wrap
#runtime: shiny
---

<a href="https://robertslab.github.io/resources/Agentic-Coding-Tools/#five-level-rubric"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/AI%20Use-Level%202%20Drafting%2FCoding-yellowgreen" alt="AI Use Level 2: AI-assisted drafting or coding"/></a>

This past Sunday I headed out to Baywater Farm to deploy the remaining oyster bags and assess the priming treatment. These oysters have been out about 3 years now.

![](images/baywater-priming-deploy.jpg)

Worked the bags at low tide, pulling them up to check condition before redeploying.
